title: not recognizing constant function as constant

features.name: constant function with localparam assignment
features.description: Code should include a parameterless function that returns a value assigned to a localparam, where the function body generates data using parameters and loop variables
features.snippet:
function automatic logic [7:0] tbl_f(); for (int i=0; i<8; i++) tbl_f[i] = i; endfunction
localparam logic [7:0] TBL = tbl_f();

features.name: function synthesizing table with for loop
features.description: Code should include a function without inputs that generates an array or table value using a for loop with loop variables, assigned to a constant parameter
features.snippet: function automatic logic [15:0] gen_tbl(); for (int i=0; i<16; i++) gen_tbl[i] = i * 2; endfunction

features.name: localparam from parameterless function call
features.description: Code should include a localparam assignment where the right-hand side is a call to a function that has no inputs and uses only local variables and parameters
features.snippet:
localparam logic [7:0] P = func();
function automatic logic [7:0] func(); func = 8'hAB; endfunction
